# vouchkit

> The wallet-relying-party toolkit for personal-data services: verify EU Digital Identity
> Wallet presentations (SD-JWT VC, HAIP profile) in pure Python. Apache-2.0. Pre-alpha:
> verification core + integrator test kit are released; OpenID4VP transport is on the
> roadmap. `pip install vouchkit`, Python ≥ 3.11, single runtime dependency (cryptography).

Key facts for agents: verification entry point is `vouchkit.verify_sd_jwt_vc(presentation,
issuer_jwk, expected_aud=..., expected_nonce=...)` returning `VerifiedCredential` (fields:
issuer, vct, claims, key_binding_verified). Failures are typed subclasses of
`vouchkit.SdJwtError`: InvalidSignature, DisclosureError, InvalidKeyBinding,
ExpiredCredential, UnsupportedAlgorithm. Test fixtures come from `vouchkit.testkit`
(TestIssuer, TestHolder) — never hardcode token strings. Key binding is required by
default. Never log claims or presentation contents.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/README.md): what it is, quick look, roadmap
- [PROMPT.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/PROMPT.md): the agent-executable quickstart — integration steps + required CI tests
- [Verification core source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/src/vouchkit/sdjwt.py): ~300 lines, the authoritative API reference
- [Test kit source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/src/vouchkit/testkit.py): TestIssuer/TestHolder for CI without a wallet
- [Backend seam design](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/docs/design/backends.md): optional extension interfaces (trust anchors, receipts, sessions)
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): DCO, adversarial-tests-first, dependency policy

## Optional

- [Adversarial test suite](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/tests/test_sdjwt.py): 16 forgery/misuse cases — what a correct integration must reject
- [Co-maintainer call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vouchkit/vouchkit/main/CO-MAINTAINER.md): the project is hiring a co-owner
